% fig_lec08_geodesic.tex — Geodesic on M with parallelly-transported tangent
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec07_lec08.jl
%
% Initial point  p = (-2.0, -1.5)  in chart coords; initial tangent
% T(0) = (0.7, 0.4).  The geodesic ODE  ẍ^σ + Γ^σ_{μν}(x) ẋ^μ ẋ^ν = 0
% is integrated with the Levi-Civita connection of the induced metric.
% Tangent vectors T^a are drawn at five sample t-points; T^a is parallelly
% transported along itself, T^a ∇_a T^b = 0.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.0cm, height=6.2cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    % Geodesic curve
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec08_geodesic_M.dat};

    % Tangent vectors along the geodesic
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec08_geodesic_tangents.dat};

    % Endpoints
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.8pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec08_geodesic_endpoints.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.05,-1.50,0.05) {$p$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:1.60,0.74,0.43) {$q$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:-1.30,-1.20,0.05) {$T^a$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:-0.20,-0.40,-0.10) {$C$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
